scripts.build:packages: bun run clean:packages && bun run --cwd runtime build && bun run --cwd compiler build && bun run --cwd solkit build
scripts.clean:packages: bun -e "import { rm } from 'node:fs/promises'; await Promise.all(['runtime/dist', 'compiler/dist', 'solkit/dist'].map(path => rm(path, { recursive: true, force: true })))"
scripts.format: oxfmt --write AGENTS.md README.md docs package.json bunfig.toml tsconfig.json .github scripts && oxfmt --write compiler/README.md compiler/package.json compiler/tsconfig.json compiler/tsconfig.build.json compiler/src compiler/tests && oxfmt --write runtime/README.md runtime/package.json runtime/tsconfig.json runtime/tsconfig.build.json runtime/src runtime/tests && oxfmt --write solkit/README.md solkit/package.json solkit/tsconfig.json solkit/tsconfig.build.json solkit/src solkit/tests && oxfmt --write example/README.md example/index.html example/package.json example/playwright.config.ts example/tsconfig.json example/vite.config.ts example/src example/tests && oxfmt --write web/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md web/README.md web/index.html web/package.json web/playwright.config.ts web/tsconfig.json web/vite.config.ts web/src web/tests
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check AGENTS.md README.md docs package.json bunfig.toml tsconfig.json .github scripts && oxfmt --check compiler/README.md compiler/package.json compiler/tsconfig.json compiler/tsconfig.build.json compiler/src compiler/tests && oxfmt --check runtime/README.md runtime/package.json runtime/tsconfig.json runtime/tsconfig.build.json runtime/src runtime/tests && oxfmt --check solkit/README.md solkit/package.json solkit/tsconfig.json solkit/tsconfig.build.json solkit/src solkit/tests && oxfmt --check example/README.md example/index.html example/package.json example/playwright.config.ts example/tsconfig.json example/vite.config.ts example/src example/tests && oxfmt --check web/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md web/README.md web/index.html web/package.json web/playwright.config.ts web/tsconfig.json web/vite.config.ts web/src web/tests
scripts.lint: bun run lint:oxc && bun run lint:types
scripts.test: bun run --cwd runtime test && bun run --cwd compiler test && bun run --cwd solkit test && bun run --cwd web test
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && bun run --cwd example test:e2e && bun run --cwd web test:e2e
scripts.publish:packages: bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish ./runtime/dist && npm publish ./compiler/dist && npm publish ./solkit/dist
scripts.verify: bun run format && bun run lint:fix && bun run lint:types && bun run test
scripts.verify:ci: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run test
